claim_support.reason: Claims are substantively supported by the content of the provided evidence chunks and calculation objects.

numerical_accuracy.reason: All financial figures, margins, and growth rates match the authoritative calculation IDs and evidence snippets exactly.

citation_precision.reason: Structured citation IDs (chunks and calcs) correctly map to the supporting evidence blocks for the respective claims.

temporal_validity.reason: Severe post-as-of violation: Recent Developments Paragraph 1 cites a news source (SeekingAlpha/Visible Alpha consensus) dated 2026-02-04 in a report with an as-of date of 2026-02-03.

consistency.reason: No internal contradictions found between sections; financial data is consistent across Financial Analysis and Business & Competitive Analysis.
